notes: Phase 1 / Tier 14 list (Mogu'shan Vaults, Heart of Fear, Terrace of Endless Spring — Heroic versions). Tier token bosses: helm = Sha of Fear, shoulders = Lei Shi, chest = Grand Empress Shek'zeer, hands = Wind Lord Mel'jarak, legs = Amber-Shaper Un'sok. Four-piece Firebird's with a non-tier chest (Mail of Screaming Secrets); Kri'tak with the Eye of the Ancient Spirit; Relic of Yu'lon is the Darkmoon caster trinket. Draft compiled from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Restoration Shaman gear guide (Phase 1 table).
